title: angelica polymorpha var. fallax
intro: Angelica polymorpha var. fallax, also known as American angelica or wild angelica, is a variety of the angelica plant species that is native to North America. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of using American angelica include reducing fever, relieving pain, and easing respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. American angelica can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
